Cosmic Profile

// B.Tech Information Technology Student | Web Developer | Blockchain & AI/ML Enthusiast
I design and build scalable, high-performance web applications and blockchain-powered products, backed by a strong foundation in core computer science principles and modern development practices.

Internships

Jul 2025 - Aug 2025

Software Engineer Intern

Bluestock™🔺
Remote (Maharashtra, India)

As an SDE Intern, I actively contribute to the development of scalable and efficient software solutions. My responsibilities include writing clean and maintainable code, debugging and resolving issues, collaborating with senior developers in Agile teams, and participating in code reviews to ensure high-quality deliverables.

Bandva Agro Pvt. Ltd.
Hybrid (Uttar Pradesh, India)
